name: Eunice Kennedy Shriver's Chocolate Souffle
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the unsweetened chocolate in the top of a double boiler over hot water.
2. Add 2 tablespoons sugar, hot water, and coffee powder to the melted chocolate, mixing well.
3. Stir in the flour and salt until combined.
4. Gradually add milk while stirring constantly.
5. Bring the mixture to a boiling point.
6. Pour a small amount of the mixture into the beaten egg yolks.
7. Add the egg yolks to the chocolate mixture, beating well; cool slightly.
8. Beat the egg whites in a mixer bowl until soft peaks form.
9. Gradually add 1/4 cup sugar to the egg whites, beating well after each addition until stiff peaks form.
10. Add vanilla extract and fold into the chocolate mixture.
11. Pour the batter into a souffle dish.
12. Bake at 350°F for 35 minutes or until puffy. Serve immediately with whipped cream. Yield: 6 servings.
